reports.prompt: Show me whale flow and top holders for a live single-outcome politics market on Polymarket.
reports.responsePreview:
I am unable to provide the current whale flow and holders for a live Polymarket politics market at this time. 

The data retrieval process encountered a technical error (AbortError) during the analysis of the market data. While the system identified the specific tool needed to perform this deep analysis, the request timed out or was aborted before the results could be fetched. 

If you would like to try again, please specify a particular political event or market slug you are interested in, and I can attempt to pull the data again.
